description: A graphic styled as a Fox News article card. A blue FOX NEWS banner runs across the top, followed by a small red IMMIGRATION label. The bold headline, with parts highlighted in yellow, reads USCIS sees massive surge in 'Homeland Defender' job applications, with a subhead reading USCIS saw more than 20,000 applications in under 2 weeks. Below is a photograph of a person holding a small American flag and a Star-Spangled Banner / Pledge of Allegiance handout with a hand over the heart, at what appears to be a citizenship ceremony.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; IMMIGRATION; USCIS sees massive surge in 'Homeland Defender' job applications; USCIS saw more than 20,000 applications in under 2 weeks
